top_3_images.render_prompt: Orthographic top and side views of Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome FKM rubber) on white background. Labels: '40.35mm inner socket', '0.7mm retaining lip', '22mm lug width'. Minimalist typography, flat lighting, no shadows. Ultra-sharp focus, engineering blueprint aesthetic.
top_3_images.why: Authority-driven design aligns with 'Design obsession' trend. Technical precision appeals to watch enthusiasts and collectors.

top_3_images.render_prompt: Royal Pop watch on wrist with Cradle Adapter V1 (Otto Rosso). Raking light to highlight FKM texture. Minimalist background, shallow depth of field. Wrist angle: 30° tilt, 10° rotation. No logos, no distractions.
top_3_images.why: Scarcity (Otto Rosso) + premium wrist shot archetype. Raking light emphasises material quality, key for design-led buyers.

top_3_images.render_prompt: Split image: Left side shows Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on Royal Pop with perfect flush fit. Right side shows generic adapter with visible gap. Labels: '40.35mm exact' (left) vs. '40.2mm' (right). Flat lighting, white background.
top_3_images.why: Contrast angle leverages competitor launches (5 detected today). 'Exact fit' framing drives urgency and shares.

Aftermarket Royal Pop wrist conversion race

final_brief.why_these_will_work: 1. **Urgency**: Royal Pop momentum peaks before AP×Swatch drop (16 May). 2. **Differentiation**: FKM rubber, 0.7mm lip, and 'no drilling' specs outperform competitors. 3. **Proven hooks**: Spec-driven (REEL_1) and colourway scarcity (REEL_2) patterns scored 9/10 in past posts. 4. **Platform fit**: Technical boards (IMG_1) for Instagram, wrist shots (IMG_3) for TikTok.
final_brief.do_this_first: Film REEL_1 shot list today. ETA: 64 mins. Competitor adapters launching within 48h — critical to own the '40.35mm exact' narrative first.
